title: Thriller Bark’s Zombies Awaken: Rising Conflict
description: In the Thriller Bark storyline, this section centers on Perona, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8 as the scene develops across pages 6–9.
scene: This scene advances the Thriller Bark conflict through Perona, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #7, focusing on the immediate stakes of thriller bark’s zombies awaken: rising conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: There is not even one treasure chest...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: There are chests but they're all empty...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: And there is really little money.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Moria-sama is calling for the three enigmas.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: The master? What does he want?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: It looks like he caught "Strawhat Luffy"!!

dialogue.speaker: Perona
dialogue.text: What are you doing in my room?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: You're as mean as ever to Kumashi.

dialogue.speaker: Perona
dialogue.text: Anyway, why did we hide in here?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Absalom- SAMA!! So here you are.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: There's something you need to hear ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Someone just fell from the sky....!!

summary: This scene advances the Thriller Bark conflict through Perona, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #7, focusing on the immediate stakes of thriller bark’s zombies awaken: rising conflict.
